name: Cinder Creatures
description: Cinder monster-catcher pack for GB Studio 4.x v0.12: first gym playable. New GYM-LOGIC scene (15 backgrounds, ARCHIVIST EOS leader + 4 LOGIC-type trainers) wires the type-chart riddle, all 4 trainer fights, and a 3-creature leader battle. Adds EVENT_CC_BADGE_UNLOCK that ORs a bit into VAR_CC_BADGES (1=LOGIC/2=MEM/4=PROC/8=DATA/16=CORE) so the companion app reads cleared badges out of the save header. Carries forward v0.11's USB-driven catch loop (cinder.db -> encounter_pool.json -> EVENT_CC_POOL_ENCOUNTER), 56 cinderized creature sprites, 16 script events, playable starter scenes, 5 sound FX, 5-type chart, 5 named gym leaders (ARCHIVIST EOS/WARDEN SOMA/CONDUCTOR TEMPO/COURIER HERMES/FOREMAN ATLAS).
author: Meridian (for Joel Kometz)
